narrative:
Southington Twp B (precinct in Trumbull County) has 729 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.1 percentage points.
